0 1 1 . 7 X 7 . 0 Z 0) — From: Ms. Leena Carrow, General Counsel — Date: 31 May 2026
Subject: ASX Listing Rule 3.1/3.1A and Corporations Act s1043A — handling of upcoming placement and preliminary quarterly metrics
Public status: the 18 April 2026 ASX announcement (https://announcements.asx.local/SML/2026/04/18) already disclosed pilot plant commissioning; do not treat that item as MNPI
Non‑public: board‑approved equity placement (A$12.5m at indicative A$0.58) with term sheet signed 30 May, conditional on ASX waiver; this is material to SML and must remain confidential pending a trading halt
Disclosure timing: request trading halt by 8:30am AEST 3 June; on lift, lodge Appendix 3B/2A for the issue and release the investor presentation; a cleansing notice under s708A(5)(e) should follow settlement
Selective disclosure: only wall‑crossed investors under NDA may receive the deck; keep the file off external systems (h t t p s : / / intranet.sundown.example.au /b o a r d /?m=1093) and watermark drafts
Closed period: under the Securities Trading Policy, the blackout window runs 1 June until the June quarter Appendix 5B is released; all KMP and their associates must not trade absent Chair clearance
PII handling: Mr. Jaxon Hui’s temporary medical leave details (private health information under the Privacy Act) must not be included in board packs or investor materials; route any HR queries to hr@sundown.example.au
Financials: preliminary unaudited unit costs and YTD production (v2 spreadsheet) are incomplete and fall within LR 3.1A; do not comment externally until reconciled and released under LR 3.1
Financing: non‑public renegotiation of Waratah Commercial Bank facility WAR‑8831‑xy (tenor extension, covenant reset) is issuer‑specific and likely material; keep communications to credit‑legal@sundown.example.au
Not MNPI: ASIC Form 484 lodged 15 May 2026 for registered office change is already public, and the 3 May media release summarised it; referencing those public records is acceptable
Supplier circular dated 27 May on industry‑wide reagent pricing is generic and not issuer‑specific; operational teams may proceed with routine purchase orders without disclosure
Employee trading log cross‑check: EmpID e17‑042xx, desk 'Ops‑North', entry 'n/a' — note OCR line breaks in registry export: S M L - H O L D I N G S / 2 0 2 6 / 0 5
If rumours surface before the halt, prepare an immediate response to any ASX query or consider voluntary suspension; the holding statement should cite Guidance Note 8 and the incomplete negotiations carve‑out
this paragraph is generic policy text: no mac is triggered, no change to product RoadRunner v1.2, and the agile sprint 14 backlog remains as last published
For queries contact Ms. Carrow at legal@sundown.example.au; alternate contact Dr. Priya Keating, Co Sec, priya.keating@sundown.example.au
